content: As he walked, Pinocchio noticed a tiny insect glimmering on the trunk of a tree, a small being that glowed with a pale, soft light.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Mentre camminava, Pinocchio notò un piccolo insetto scintillante sul tronco di un albero, un piccolo essere che brillava
